subtitle: 3 things to be thankful for, every day

views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main view showing today's gratitude status, current streak with flame animation, mood sparkline for the past 14 days, top 3 gratitude themes as a mini donut, and quick-add FAB. When today's entry exists, display the 3 items as beautifully styled quote cards with theme icons.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Guided 3-step entry flow: each gratitude item gets its own focused text field with a warm prompt ('I'm grateful for…'), a horizontal scrolling theme picker with icons below it, then a mood slider (1-5 with emoji faces: 😔😐🙂😊🤩) at the end, plus an expandable optional reflection text area. Feels like a mini meditation, not a form.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Calendar heatmap (yellow intensity = mood rating) at top, tappable to filter. Below: date-grouped cards showing the 3 gratitude items with theme badges. Filter chips for themes. Search bar to find past gratitudes by keyword. Each card shows mood emoji and theme icons at a glance.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Four insight sections: (1) Mood Over Time line chart (7d/30d/90d toggle), (2) Theme Distribution donut chart showing what you're most grateful for, (3) Mood × Theme correlation bar chart (which themes correlate with highest mood), (4) AI-style Insights cards (streak milestones, mood trends, underrepresented themes, consistency patterns). Weekly summary card at top with mood delta vs previous week.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayEntry
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Today's gratitude entry if it exists, nil otherwise

viewModelComputedProperties.name: hasLoggedToday
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Whether the user has completed today's gratitude entry

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of consecutive days with a gratitude entry, counting backward from today (or yesterday if today not yet logged)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalEntries
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total number of gratitude entries ever recorded

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyMoodAverage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average moodAfter rating for entries in the current calendar week (Mon-Sun)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: previousWeekMoodAverage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average moodAfter for the previous calendar week, used to compute week-over-week delta

viewModelComputedProperties.name: moodTrendDirection
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Returns 'up', 'down', or 'stable' comparing this week's mood average to last week's. Up if delta > 0.2, down if < -0.2, stable otherwise

viewModelComputedProperties.name: themeDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All themes across all 3 slots aggregated and sorted by frequency descending. Used for donut chart.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topThemes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Top 3 most frequently used gratitude themes across all entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: underusedThemes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Themes that appear in fewer than 5% of total theme slots, used for 'Try appreciating...' nudge insight

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageMoodByTheme
viewModelComputedProperties.description: For each theme, the average moodAfter of entries where that theme appears in any slot. Sorted by avgMood descending. Reveals which life areas bring most joy.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: moodChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily moodAfter values for the selected time range (7/30/90 days), used for the line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyCompletionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of days this week with a gratitude entry (0.0-1.0)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyCompletionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of days this month with a gratitude entry

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Progress toward weekly goal (default 7 days/week). Returns 0.0-1.0 for the progress ring.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Dynamically computed insight cards: streak milestones (7/30/100/365), mood trend alerts, theme diversity score, consistency nudges, 'your happiest theme is X' discoveries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: recentGratitudes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Flattened list of all 3 gratitude texts from the last 7 entries, used for word frequency or 'remember when you appreciated...' prompts

viewModelComputedProperties.name: calendarHeatmapData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Past 90 days with intensity 0.0 (no entry) to 1.0 (mood 5), used for the calendar heatmap visualization

dailyGoal.description: Log 3 gratitudes every day. One entry per day with all 3 items filled counts as complete. The mood slider and reflection are encouraged but not required for goal completion.
dailyGoal.defaultValue: 3 gratitudes per day, 7 days per week

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if an entry exists with all 3 gratitude text fields non-empty. Streak increments for each consecutive calendar day with an active entry. Missing a day resets the streak to 0. If today has no entry yet, streak counts from yesterday backward.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Primary trend: weekly average mood (moodAfter) compared to previous week — delta > +0.2 is 'improving', < -0.2 is 'dipping', else 'stable'. Secondary trend: theme diversity score = unique themes used this week / 11 total themes — below 0.3 triggers a 'broaden your gratitude' insight. Tertiary: consistency = entries this week / 7 — below 0.7 triggers encouragement.
insights: Streak milestone celebrations at 7, 14, 30, 50, 100, 200, 365 days with unique messages
Mood trend alert: 'Your mood has been climbing this week — gratitude is working!' or 'Mood dipped slightly — try reflecting on People or Nature themes which historically boost your mood'
Theme affinity: 'People make you happiest — entries mentioning People average 4.2/5 mood'
Theme diversity nudge: 'You haven't appreciated Nature in 3 weeks — a walk outside might inspire new gratitude'
Consistency encouragement: 'You've logged 5 of 7 days this week — two more for a perfect week!'
Reflection depth: 'Entries with reflections average 0.4 higher mood — consider adding a reflection today'
Monthly retrospective: 'In February you logged 24 entries and your top theme was Experiences'
Personal record: 'New longest streak! 45 days of gratitude — incredible dedication'
